__description: Chat interaction logs for SQL chat_logs table (ChatLog ORM). Used for daily summary reports, trend/insight detection, and sensor analytics. hours_ago is relative to seed time — used to construct realistic timestamps.

chat_logs.insight: <string: short extracted insight label, e.g. 'Khách lo ngại kích ứng với niacinamide'>
chat_logs.hours_ago: <int: 1–48 — how many hours before seed time this occurred>
